subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Lord of Bounty and the Sovereign of existence, Who hath, through a single Word, illumined the world with the light of manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک جود و سلطان وجود را لایق و سزاست که بیک کلمه عالم را بنور ظهور منور
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf], @teaching the Cause; call to teach
